summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification. The hydrated preflight covers 20 of 25 listed PRs; no GitHub mutations are planned. Hydrated PRs are classified independently because this shard is not a dedupe cluster. Five listed refs were not present in the hydrated preflight artifact and are escalated only for missing live state.
